name: Momo Wrapprs
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour flour into a mound on the counter and make a well in the center.
2. Sprinkle salt and baking powder into the well.
3. Add half of the water and mix with your hand to combine the water and flour.
4. Gradually add the remaining water, mixing continuously until the dough is smooth.
5. Knead the dough on a well-floured surface for 5 minutes.
6. Cover and let rest for 30 minutes.
7. Roll the dough into a long sausage shape about 1 inch in diameter.
8. Cut the dough into pieces that are 1 inch wide.
9. Dust each piece with flour and flatten into rounds.
10. Roll each round until it is a perfect circle, 3 to 3 1/2 inches in size, and the thickness of a coin.
11. Fill with your choice of filling.
Betty Jung, "The Kopan Cookbook"
